contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 75
- Description: Dual Tech Summit event QR codes + QR generation tooling fixes
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-assets/pull/1
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-assets/pull/3
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-assets/pull/4
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/311
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/196
  
  Details:
  Generated the 2 Dual Tech Summit event promo QR codes (SAMPLE): DTS_CC_20260626_1 -> shipments/agl4 (Oscar's ceremonial cacao), DTS_CT_20260626_1 -> shipments/agl8 (Paulo's cacao tea). Added the rows to the Agroverse QR codes sheet, seeded canonical per-QR JSON manifests + compiled-label PNGs in lineage-assets, rebuilt qrs_index; verified each resolves via Edgar 302 -> agl4/agl8 opt-in. Then fixed the recurring QR tooling stumbles: (1) lineage-assets batch_compiler now writes the COMPILED label (QR + centre logo + copy + serial) to pngs/ instead of a bare QR -- the root cause of cacao-bag QRs rendering in the wrong format on truesight.me/qr; (2) added generate_qr_batch.sh, the parameter-locked canonical wrapper, plus LINEAGE_ASSETS.md callouts, so QR codes are not hand-rolled with the qrcode lib; (3) the deprecated tokenomics batch_compiler.py now transparently forwards to the lineage-assets generator (resolving relative paths) instead of dead-ending on the deprecation abort. Related merged PRs in the cluster: lineage-assets #2, go_to_market #134/#135/#136, agentic_ai_context #199.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
